- [ ] Group A ‚Äî Book (`group-a-book`)
- [ ] Group B ‚Äî Member (`group-b-member`)

### Type of Change
- [ ] New module / feature
- [ ] Bug fix

### Checklist
- [ ] Code follows agreed naming (`isbn`, `title`, `author`, `copies`, `member_id`)
- [ ] Functions and classes have docstrings
- [ ] No changes outside assigned group scope
- [ ] Interface changes reported to Group G (if applicable)
- [ ] `python test_library.py` passes (standalone modules)
- [ ] `python manage.py test` passes (Django integration)
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one other group
- [ ] Group H has verified tests
